name: vidcraft
description: AIGC video creation platform for TikTok e-commerce

scripts.dev: concurrently -n infra,frontend,backend -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:infra" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:infra: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis minio jaeger
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
scripts.lint: cd frontend && npm run lint && cd ../backend && npm run lint
scripts.type-check: cd frontend && npm run type-check && cd ../backend && npm run type-check
